## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [14 new content pieces ready for upload by week's end; remaining API pages being finalized](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Adding pricing sections to API directory pages to target relevant queries](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Content performance improving; impressions up to 24K, SEMrush score +50 points since March](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Plans to implement quote library and focus on content refreshes/optimization end of April](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates

  - [14 new pieces ready for upload by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Finishing remaining API pages](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [First snap page sent for review (modeled after Jimmy's example)](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [API security and API performance/optimization are top-performing categories](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Impressions up to 24K (another jump this week)](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Clicks slightly up from previous week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Average position up 0.1](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [CTR down 0.1 (small but worth monitoring trend)](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [SEMrush score +50 points since beginning of March](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)

### Backlinks and Citations

  - [4 new backlinks added for Zuplo (showing up in SEMrush)](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Implementing quote blocks in content (Adrian to create component)](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Adding pricing sections to API directory pages](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Target queries like "deep-seek pricing", "quick market pricing"](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Focus on pricing structure rather than exact figures](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [Include link to official pricing page](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Potential content cannibalization concerns](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [Plan to analyze and potentially merge/optimize similar content](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Content refresh initiative](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [Focus on articles ranking 10-20 position](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
      - [Revamp and reshare on socials](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

### Category Restructuring

  - [Replacing "monetization" category with broader topics:](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
      - [API product strategy](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
      - [Monetization](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

      - [Marketing](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Aim for higher volume, lower difficulty keywords](https://fathom.video/share/p3_BtS2y1K51YdEVzkkMe6D9xo3_sEab?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
